title: sesamum indicum
intro: Sesamum indicum, also known as the tropical sesame plant, is a flowering plant native to Africa and India. The plant is a rich source of sesamin and sesamolin, which have been found to have medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of Sesamum indicum include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and improving digestion, as well as providing relief from symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Sesamum indicum can be prepared as an herbal supplement in the form of capsules or oil, or used as a tea, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
